summary.text: [0-6] A woman with brown hair pulled back, wearing a bright green top, stands in a kitchen featuring white cabinets and a silver microwave. She opens her eyes from a closed position, smiles widely, and speaks with animated expressions, briefly raising her hands in a gesture before lowering them. [6-12] The scene cuts to a static close-up of a golden-brown loaf studded with chocolate chips resting on a black wire rack. Beside the bread lie two slices of orange and a whole yellow banana, with loose chocolate chips scattered on the surface. [12-14] The video returns to the woman in the kitchen, who stands centrally and smiles broadly against the backdrop of white tiled walls and appliances.

A woman in a bright green top stands centrally in a kitchen with white cabinets, a silver microwave, and a fruit basket to her left. From 14s to 24s, she speaks with animated expressions, transitioning from an open mouth to a broad, toothy smile. Her left hand briefly gestures outward at the bottom edge around 18s. At 24s, she turns her head right and looks downward. Finally, from 26s to 28s, she brings both hands into view near her waist, holding and manipulating a white item resembling a napkin or paper while focusing on it. The background remains static throughout.

In a close-up, hands pour white flour from a small white bowl into a larger beige mixing bowl resting on a pink cutting board atop a white counter. To the left, small pink and green bowls sit on a black stovetop near a yellow banana. The hand lifts the small white bowl away, revealing the flour, and the small bowl exits the frame. Background items remain stationary. The video cuts to the woman in a green shirt standing in the kitchen. She looks downward briefly before lifting her head to face forward and speak. Behind her, white cabinets, a silver microwave, and a wire fruit basket are visible. Lighting stays consistent. A close-up captures hands pouring a white powdery substance from a small clear glass bowl into the larger beige mixing bowl. The scene cuts to the woman in the green top looking downward with her mouth slightly open, positioned centrally in front of the white kitchen cabinets and silver microwave.

From [42-52], hands use a red spatula to mix white powder inside a beige bowl resting on a pink cutting board. To the left, small pink and green bowls sit on a black surface near a yellow banana. At [52-54], the beige bowl is lifted away, leaving the pink board empty on the white counter. Then, at [54-56], a clear glass measuring jug labeled "PYREX" is placed onto the pink board, while the flour bowl moves to the bottom edge. Finally, from [56-58], the view changes to a woman in a green top speaking directly to the camera. Behind her are white cabinets with copper handles, a silver microwave, a black range hood, and a wire fruit basket filled with yellow and green fruit against a white tiled backsplash.

[58-64] A woman in a bright green top stands centrally in a kitchen with white cabinets, a silver microwave, and a wire fruit basket, speaking directly to the camera before lowering her gaze to the counter. Banana peels rest on the adjacent black surface near small green and pink bowls containing ingredients. Hands wearing a ring continue pressing the fork down repeatedly, further crushing the fruit inside the Pyrex jug.

[72-74] A woman in a green top speaks to the camera in a kitchen with white cabinets and a silver microwave. [78-84] Next, she holds a small green bowl over the cup and uses a red-handled spoon to scrape a golden liquid into the mixture. Yellow banana peels rest on the black surface to the left.

[86-88] Hands scrape golden liquid from a small green bowl into the Pyrex jug, then move the green bowl out of frame. [88-96] Hands hold a small pink bowl over the glass measuring jug. A spoon transfers a white substance, described as powder then thick substance, from the pink bowl into the mashed banana mixture. The jug, marked "PYREX", rests on a pink cutting board. Yellow banana peels lie on a black surface to the left. The person in a green shirt uses the spoon to scrape the white ingredient into the liquid mixture inside the jug.

[98-102] Hands scrape a white substance from a small pink bowl into a glass measuring jug containing mashed bananas. The bowl is removed, leaving the white ingredient resting on top of the yellow mixture. The jug, featuring red "PYREX" lettering, sits on a pink cutting board next to yellow banana peels. Hands then hold a brown egg directly above the vessel. [102-108] The hands crack the brown egg shell, dropping the yolk and white into the mixture. The raw egg contents settle atop the mashed bananas and white dollop inside the Pyrex vessel. Finally, the hands move out of view, leaving the combined ingredients in the glass jug.

[96-98] Hands scrape a thick white substance into a glass Pyrex measuring jug containing mashed bananas. The white ingredient sits atop the yellow fruit base inside the vessel, resting on a pink cutting board beside banana peels on a black surface. [108-112] A person pours a dark liquid from a small clear glass container into the jug, which now holds the bananas, white dollop, and a raw egg. [112-114] A hand enters holding a utensil and begins vigorously stirring the mixture, blending the yellow, white, and brown components together inside the glass vessel.

[116-120] Hands vigorously stir ingredients including mashed bananas, a white substance, an egg, and dark liquid within a clear glass Pyrex jug marked "PYREX" situated on a pink cutting board. A metal utensil blends the contents while banana peels lie on the black surface to the left. A glass Pyrex jug filled with yellow batter sits nearby, displaying the 'PYREX' logo, while banana peels rest on a black surface to the left. Once the orange is cut in half, she separates the pieces, leaving one half on the board. Finally, she uses both hands to squeeze the orange half over the jug, extracting juice into the batter mixture.

[114-116] Hands vigorously stir mashed bananas, a white dollop, raw egg, and dark liquid inside a clear glass PYREX jug resting on a pink cutting board using a metal utensil. [132-138] Hands continue firmly squeezing an orange half over the jug, extracting fresh juice into the yellow batter mixture below. Fingers press against the peel to release liquid, with a silver ring visible on the left ring finger. The remaining orange half rests on the pink cutting board, while discarded yellow banana peels lie on the black surface to the left.

[140-146] Hands firmly squeeze and twist an orange half over a glass Pyrex jug containing yellow batter, pressing fingers deeply into the peel to extract juice. The remaining orange half rests stationary on a pink cutting board, while discarded banana peels lie on a black surface to the left. [146-148] Following the squeezing, a hand introduces a yellow-handled zester, scraping the orange peel directly over the glass jug to add zest to the yellow mixture. [172-176] A glass Pyrex jug tilts vertically to pour the final yellow batter into a white bowl containing flour on a pink cutting board. Once the jug is removed, the liquid pools atop the dry ingredients. Banana peels rest on the black surface to the left.

As the mixing continues, the ingredients blend further, becoming slightly more incorporated, although patches of dry flour remain visible in the mixture throughout the sequence.

[6-12] The scene cuts to a static close-up of a golden-brown loaf studded with chocolate chips resting on a black wire rack. Beside the bread lie two slices of orange and a whole yellow banana, with loose chocolate chips scattered on the surface. [12-14] The video returns to the woman in the kitchen, who stands centrally and smiles broadly against the backdrop of white tiled walls and appliances. A woman in a bright green top stands centrally in a kitchen with white cabinets, a silver microwave, and a fruit basket to her left. From 14s to 24s, she speaks with animated expressions, transitioning from an open mouth to a broad, toothy smile. Her left hand briefly gestures outward at the bottom edge around 18s. At 24s, she turns her head right and looks downward. Finally, from 26s to 28s, she brings both hands into view near her waist, holding and manipulating

[208-212] A person wearing a green top holds a rectangular metal loaf tin lined with white parchment paper directly over a white bowl filled with batter and chocolate chips. The tin is suspended above a pink cutting board, while banana peels and a knife remain visible on the black countertop to the left. [212-216] The view transitions to the woman in the bright green top standing centrally in the kitchen. She faces the camera directly, transitioning from a slight smile to speaking, with white cabinets, a silver microwave, a black range hood, and a white tiled backsplash visible in the background.

[216-224] A woman in a green top pours thick, pale yellow batter studded with chocolate chips from a white bowl into a grey loaf tin lined with parchment paper, resting on a pink cutting board. She utilizes a red spatula with white polka dots to scrape the bowl's interior and assist the transfer. As the dense mixture flows, it piles into the tin. Nearby on a black surface, banana peels and a pink bowl with eggs are visible. The sequence captures the continuous action of emptying the bowl into the prepared baking tin.

[206-208] Hands stir a pale yellow batter containing dark chocolate chips in a white bowl using a red utensil with white polka dots. The left hand stabilizes the bowl on a pink cutting board, while banana peels lie on the black countertop to the left. [224-228] The thick batter pours from the white bowl into a grey loaf tin lined with parchment paper. A red spatula with white dots scrapes the bowl's interior to guide the mixture as it piles into the tin resting on the pink board. [228-230] The scene cuts to a medium shot of a woman in a green top standing centrally in a kitchen. She faces the camera with her mouth slightly open, positioned in front of white cabinets, a silver microwave, and a black range hood.

[232-238] A person in a green top holds a grey loaf tin lined with parchment paper, filled with batter and chocolate chips, positioned over a pink cutting board. To the left, banana peels and a knife rest on a black surface, while the person's right hand gestures near the tin. [238-240] The view cuts to a medium shot of a woman with brown hair tied back in a green long-sleeved top, standing centrally in a kitchen with white cabinets and a silver microwave, facing the camera and speaking.

recent_thinks.text: Hands continue mashing yellow banana pieces inside a clear glass Pyrex jug using a metal fork on a pink cutting board. The scene cuts to the woman in the green top looking downward and slightly left, standing centrally in front of white kitchen cabinets, a silver microwave, and a black range hood.

Hands hold a small green bowl over the Pyrex jug, using a spoon to scrape the last of the golden liquid into the mashed banana mixture. The bowl is now empty. The jug sits on a pink cutting board, with banana peels visible on the black surface to the left.

A person wearing a green top holds a grey loaf tin lined with white parchment paper, now filled with thick, pale yellow batter studded with chocolate chips. The tin is positioned above a pink cutting board on a white counter, while banana peels and a knife rest on the black surface to the left.

The woman in the bright green top stands centrally in the kitchen, facing the camera and speaking. Her facial expressions change slightly as she talks. Behind her, white cabinets, a silver microwave, and a black range hood remain visible against the white tiled backsplash.

The woman in the green top stands centrally and speaks. The scene cuts to a close-up of a black oven with silver knobs. A hand reaches for the silver handle and begins to pull the oven door open, revealing the illuminated interior racks.

The black oven door opens fully to reveal illuminated interior racks. A person wearing a green top places a grey loaf tin lined with white parchment paper and filled with batter onto the middle rack. Their hand guides the tin into the center of the appliance beneath silver control knobs.

A hand places the grey loaf tin filled with batter onto the middle rack of the open oven. Subsequently, the hand grips the long silver handle and pushes the black oven door shut, enclosing the baking tin inside the illuminated appliance.

recent_thinks.text: Hands continue mashing yellow banana pieces inside a clear glass Pyrex jug using a metal fork on a pink cutting board. The scene cuts to the woman in the green top looking downward and slightly left, standing centrally in front of white kitchen cabinets, a silver microwave, and a black range hood.

Hands hold a small green bowl over the Pyrex jug, using a spoon to scrape the last of the golden liquid into the mashed banana mixture. The bowl is now empty. The jug sits on a pink cutting board, with banana peels visible on the black surface to the left.

A person wearing a green top holds a grey loaf tin lined with white parchment paper, now filled with thick, pale yellow batter studded with chocolate chips. The tin is positioned above a pink cutting board on a white counter, while banana peels and a knife rest on the black surface to the left.

A cookbook titled "my fussy eater" stands on a white marble surface. To the right, black text reads "my fussy eater" with "CIARA ATTWELL" in pink below. A pink note in the bottom right corner displays "OUT NOW - ORDER YOUR COPY NOW!" in black text.
